(NI-gal) fi.Kr, TR, it i-Inssqm-it fticb-q,u4K-500026 rtzT qizicb al14-*-7.-#Teu aTrOrr avamTr trrt) klicrf ft:r-T 18 ITC 2010 1:1 717 -q-Ei areal. 31'94-41 3TO 31r, 1-11 4$c4 t, 311TT Tim-4* 1 rh-T. 3-11/2010-It (cd)] A1vil TiFu MINISTRY OF WOMEN AND CHILD DEVELOPMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th May, 2010 S.O. 1173(E).—In pursuance of Section 4 of the Commissions for Protection of Child Rights Act, 2005 (4 of 2006) the Government of India hereby nominates Dr. (Smt.) Shantha Sinha, 3A, Entrenchment Road, Marredpally West, Secunderabad - 500 026 as the Chairperson of the National Commission for Protection of Child Rights, New Delhi. Dr. (Smt.) Shantha Sinha shall hold office for a period of three years from 18th May, 2010 or until further orders, whichever is earlier. IF. No. 3-11/2010-CW-I (Pt.)] VIVEK JOSHI , It.
